<!--
Thank you for the contribution! Please fill the sections below before
requesting a review. Lines wrapped in HTML comments are hidden in the
final PR description.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #12, Refs #34. Use "Closes" only when this PR fully
resolves the issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Other: ____

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` (if it exists) and followed the
      conventions there.
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the changed behaviour.
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally.
- [ ] `--help` output and the man page (if applicable) reflect the
      change.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data were committed.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything the reviewer should focus on, known limitations,
follow-up tasks, screenshots of CLI output, etc. -->
